nasb.text: and he spoke kindly to him and set his throne above the throne of the kings who were with him in Babylon.

esv.text: And he spoke kindly to him and gave him a seat above the seats of the kings who were with him in Babylon.

cnv.text: 並且安慰他，使他的地位高過和他一起在巴比倫的眾王。

ccb.text: 并好言相待，使他的地位高过被掳到巴比伦的其他各王。
